resolutions.finding: Local synthetic and protected production evidence are represented as different provenance values and cannot satisfy the same phase gate.
Alpha closes every production feature flag; Beta is Raw-only; M3 is fixed to Budget 1; GA has no guessed mutation budget.
Real Gmail, private GitHub, protected Secrets, Recovery Key and scheduled production execution were not authorized in this local run.
The no-intermediate-upload rule prevents GitHub-hosted Stage 7 observation until an owner-approved delivery order exists.

All eight local Stage 7 mechanisms now exist as separate fail-closed paths, including deterministic Patch Lifecycle and operations decisions plus a read-only no-Secret policy workflow. This is not protected integration: the actual Automation, owner Recovery Key drill, protected candidate/canary adapters and patch operation remain absent; protected values are not provisioned, and no local provenance field can attest a GitHub-hosted run.
The owner-authorized v1.0.2 successor routes every task evidence record through its exact stage schema while preserving BLOCKED, PARTIAL and NOT_RUN claims.

final_acceptance_policy: No local test, workflow definition or elapsed wall-clock claim can convert a protected production Oracle to PASS.
